name: yxj-paper-ppg-runtime
description: Codex-native paper production graph runtime with stage-local Nature writing overlays, local backflow, and human-owner state surface.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect paper production as a visible material graph runtime with stage-local overlays.
interface.longDescription: A local, non-publishing Codex plugin surface for academic paper production using explicit material graphs, stage-local expert-writing overlays, graph-state-read-only runtime state reports, local backpropagation, validation, and main-agent dispatch.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a paper production graph runtime state.
Plan a local backflow repair from review findings.
Show active frontier, stale materials, and delivery gates.
